message:
refactor(daemon,tests): extract primary_path() helper, tighten dead_code annotations

- Extract duplicated root_paths.first().cloned().unwrap_or("/") pattern
  into MonitoringDaemon::primary_path() helper (5 call sites)
- Remove stale #[allow(dead_code)] from actively-used types: PolicyOp,
  ReplayStepResult, FaultType, BenchmarkStats (decision_plane_tests.rs)
- Add targeted #[allow(dead_code)] on genuinely unused variants/fields
  instead of blanket type-level suppression
- Include concurrent agent changes: daemon command wiring (bd-32s),
  EWMA timestamp safety (bd-3uc), meminfo unit validation (bd-rmt)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -59,7 +59,7 @@ enum MatchKind {
     Exact(&'static str),
     Prefix(&'static str),
     Suffix(&'static str),
-    #[allow(dead_code)]
+    #[allow(dead_code)] // match arm exists but no patterns use this variant yet
     Contains(&'static str),
 }
